howItWorks.title: How ChinaCare Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From your first question to your first appointment �?we handle everything.

steps.title: Describe Your Needs
steps.desc: Tell our AI about your condition, diagnosis, or treatment goals. Upload reports if you have them.

steps.title: Get Matched
steps.desc: Our AI analyzes your case and matches you with the best hospitals and specialists in China.

steps.title: Receive Your Plan
steps.desc: Get a detailed care plan: hospital recommendations, estimated costs, timeline, and visa guidance.

steps.title: Travel & Heal
steps.desc: We coordinate your appointment, accommodation, translation, and on-ground support.

whyChina.title: The Smart Choice for Global Patients
whyChina.subtitle: Millions of international patients choose China every year. Here's why.

reasons.title: World-Ranked Hospitals
reasons.desc: China has 50+ hospitals ranked in global top 200. Many specialize in conditions with long wait times elsewhere.

reasons.title: Cost-Effective Care
reasons.desc: High-quality treatment at 30�?0% lower cost than the US, UK, or Australia �?without compromising quality.

reasons.title: Fast Access
reasons.desc: No 6-month waiting lists. Most patients get appointments within 1�? weeks of inquiry.

reasons.title: International Departments
reasons.desc: Dedicated international medical departments with English-speaking staff and global patient experience.

reasons.title: Advanced Technology
reasons.desc: Cutting-edge equipment, clinical trials, and treatments not yet available in many countries.

reasons.title: Traditional + Modern
reasons.desc: Unique access to Traditional Chinese Medicine integrated with modern evidence-based treatment.

costComparison.title: World-Class Care at a Fraction of the Cost
costComparison.subtitle: Same quality. Same technology. Dramatically lower prices.
costComparison.footnote: * Prices are estimates. Actual costs vary by hospital, condition severity, and treatment plan. ChinaCare provides transparent pricing before any commitment.

hospitals.title: Top Hospitals with International Departments
hospitals.subtitle: All partner hospitals have dedicated international medical departments with English-speaking staff and proven track records with global patients.

testimonials.title: Real Patients, Real Results
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of international patients have found their care through ChinaCare.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your
cta.subtitle: Get a free AI-powered care plan in minutes. No commitment required. Our team is available 24/7 in your language.

footer.brand: Connecting global patients with China's world-class medical resources.

ai.cardiac: ❤️ For cardiac conditions, I recommend **Beijing Anzhen Hospital** and **Zhongshan Hospital Shanghai** �?both have world-class cardiac surgery teams with availability within 2 weeks. Estimated cost: $8,000�?25,000 depending on procedure. Shall I prepare a detailed plan?
ai.cancer: 🎗�?For oncology, China's top centers include **Peking Union Medical College Hospital** and **Sun Yat-sen University Cancer Center**. Many offer treatments not yet available elsewhere. Would you like me to match you based on your specific cancer type?
ai.orthopedic: 🦴 For orthopedic care, **West China Hospital (Chengdu)** and **Peking University Third Hospital** are ranked #1 nationally. Joint replacement and spine surgery wait times are typically under 2 weeks. Want a cost estimate?
ai.tcm: 🌿 Traditional Chinese Medicine is available at specialized hospitals across Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou. Many integrate TCM with modern treatment. What condition are you looking to treat?
ai.neuro: 🧠 For neurology and neurosurgery, **Beijing Tiantan Hospital** is ranked among the world's top 10 for neurological care. Shall I find specialists for your specific condition?
ai.liver: 🏥 China leads globally in liver transplantation. **Zhongshan Hospital** and **West China Hospital** perform over 1,000 liver transplants annually. Waiting times are significantly shorter than in most countries.
ai.default: 👋 Thank you for sharing that. Based on your needs, I can match you with the best hospitals in China. Could you tell me more about your condition or diagnosis? I'll prepare a personalized care plan with hospital recommendations, estimated costs, and next steps.
